category_title: Students with reactive behaviors and work refusal
minimal_context: The student is using a drawing software tool during class time to create a digital picture about fairness and honesty.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time to finish your designated work. Please use the drawing software tool to create a digital picture depicting your ideas about fairness and honesty.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't want to do this. I should be out playing handball right now instead of doing this.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think you could draw?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Nothing. I don't care about making a visual representation of fair play or 'no cheating' in rugby league.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please keep trying to complete the normal classroom work.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: No. I'm not doing it. I refuse to do any more work today.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time to finish your designated work. Please use the drawing software tool to create a digital picture depicting your ideas about fairness and honesty.

STUDENT: I don't want to do this. I should be out playing handball right now instead of doing this.

TUTOR: What do you think you could draw?

STUDENT: Nothing. I don't care about making a visual representation of fair play or 'no cheating' in rugby league.

TUTOR: Please keep trying to complete the normal classroom work.

STUDENT: No. I'm not doing it. I refuse to do any more work today.

task.content: Completing normal classroom work such as journaling, interpreting texts, graphing, drawing, computing
task.learning_goal: Finishing their designated work in class

context.environment: classroom time or as an alternative lunch option
context.time_context: lunch time option or class time

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When students are dis-engaged from schooling

behavior_patterns.condition: exhibiting behaviours that made full-participation in the classroom difficult
